0: This punishment of mine is shaping up to be rather exciting! I only thought to sate my intellectual curiosity, you see, but I ended up crossing a line. Or two. Or three...

1: Bring me anything curious, anything more unnatural than usual, and I'll tell you what it truly is. I delight in all discoveries, but let us hope for something <Emphasis>spicy</Emphasis>!

3: Appraise a piece of the Accursed or Blessed Hoard.

7: They may be ruins now, but the churches of the First Light were once abustle with parishioners and pilgrims. And where people have been, so have their belongings!

8: Among the bits and bobs fallen from loose pockets must hide treasure─treasure from a sanctum's vault, perhaps! Does not the mere thought of it make your fingers itch?

9: When exploring the deep dungeon, players will, on occasion, find pieces of the Accursed Hoard─treasure abandoned by pilgrims of eld.
